title: Agent Attestation Envelope (v0.1)
description: v0.195: a signed envelope around any LLM-produced artifact. Standardizes model name + version + tool calls + token counts + output hash + parent prompt hash so the chain of custody from agent run → proposals / diff packs / trajectory steps is auditable. Pinned by Lean Theorem 24 (agent attestation injectivity).

agent_actor.description: agent:<name> form. Must match the actor on the proposals/packs the envelope attests to.

model_version.description: Exact model version or release tag.

tool_calls.description: Ordered list of tool calls made during the run. Hashes are sha256 of canonical-bytes input/output.

output_hashes.description: sha256 of each artifact (proposal, diff pack, trajectory step) the run produced. Lets a downstream verifier confirm the artifact wasn't modified after attestation.

prompt_hash.description: Optional sha256 of the canonical prompt sent to the model. Lets a reviewer audit the model's input without storing the prompt verbatim.

parent_attestation.description: Optional reference to a prior attestation in a multi-turn chain.
